languages.text: "Один из немногих мон-кай, разговоры с которым были занятны. Ничего, его боль развеет мою скуку еще один, самый последний раз".
"One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually diverting. Never mind, his pain shall dispel my boredom one last time."
languages.original_text: "Один из немногих мон-кай, разговоры с которым были занятны. Ничего, его боль развеет мою скуку еще один, самый последний раз".

traits.locale_text: "One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually amusing. Never mind, his pain shall scatter my boredom one last time."
"One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually amusing. Never mind, his pain shall scatter my boredom one last time."
"One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually diverting. Never mind, his pain shall dispel my boredom one last time."
"One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually diverting. Never mind, his pain shall dispel my boredom one last time."

languages.text: «Uno de los pocos mon-keigh cuya conversación me resultaba entretenida. No importa, su dolor disipará mi aburrimiento por última vez».
languages.original_text: "One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually diverting. Never mind, his pain shall dispel my boredom one last time."

traits.locale_text: «Uno de los pocos mon-keigh cuya conversación me resultaba entretenida. No importa, su dolor disipará mi aburrimiento por última vez».

languages.text: “少数几个让我觉得跟它聊天还算有趣的猴子之一。无所谓了，他的痛苦至少还能最后一次替我解闷。”
languages.original_text: "One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually diverting. Never mind, his pain shall dispel my boredom one last time."

traits.locale_text: “少数几个让我觉得跟它聊天还算有趣的猴子之一。无所谓了，他的痛苦至少还能最后一次替我解闷。”

languages.text: "Einer der wenigen durchaus unterhaltsamen Chem-Pan-Sey. Egal, sein Schmerz wird mich ein letztes Mal von meiner Langeweile befreien."
languages.original_text: "One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually diverting. Never mind, his pain shall dispel my boredom one last time."

traits.locale_text: "Einer der wenigen durchaus unterhaltsamen Chem-Pan-Sey. Egal, sein Schmerz wird mich ein letztes Mal von meiner Langeweile befreien."

languages.text: « L'un des rares mon-keigh dont la conversation était quelque peu divertissante. Tant pis, sa souffrance me permettra de tromper l'ennui une dernière fois. »
languages.original_text: "One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually diverting. Never mind, his pain shall dispel my boredom one last time."

traits.locale_text: « L'un des rares mon-keigh dont la conversation était quelque peu divertissante. Tant pis, sa souffrance me permettra de tromper l'ennui une dernière fois. »

languages.text: "Sohbeti gerçekten eğlenceli olan birkaç mon-keigh'den biriydi. Boş ver, acısı can sıkıntımı son bir kez daha geçirecek."
languages.original_text: "One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually diverting. Never mind, his pain shall dispel my boredom one last time."

traits.locale_text: "Sohbeti gerçekten eğlenceli olan birkaç mon-keigh'den biriydi. Boş ver, acısı can sıkıntımı son bir kez daha geçirecek."

languages.text: 「会話が面白い、数少ないモンケイグの一人。気にしない、彼の苦しみは私の退屈を最後の一度払拭してくれるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "One of the few mon-keigh whose conversation was actually diverting. Never mind, his pain shall dispel my boredom one last time."

traits.locale_text: 「会話が面白い、数少ないモンケイグの一人。気にしない、彼の苦しみは私の退屈を最後の一度払拭してくれるだろう。」
